creator: asmodai@wxs.nl
text:
On [19991002 23:29], Charles A. Wimmer (cwimmer@wimmer.net) wrote:
>Greetings, 
>
>	I have formated the NIS article from Issue #3 of the FreeBSDzine
>in the Docbook format.  It would answer both docs/10085 and docs/10098.
>
>	It can be found at:
>
>	http://www.wimmer.net/charles/article.sgml

I have looked at it, it looks very good. Now if someone could actually
commit it it would be even better =)

Note that when this document becomes part of the -doc tree, make sure
you use send-pr to correct any mistakes with this document.
